case_title: SAM YICK BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION VS. TEMPLE HUNG

docket_entries.description: SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR CHRISTOPHER KONG FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAM YICK BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY SAM YICK BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT TEMPLE HUNG DBA HUNG'S GENERAL CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SAM YICK BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TEMPLE HUNG IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $149. SERVED MAR-09-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TEMPLE HUNG DBA HUNG'S GENERAL CONSTRUCTION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAM YICK BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY SAM YICK BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION TEMPLE HUNG DBA HUNG'S GENERAL CONSTRUCTION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-24-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SAM YICK BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHRISTOPHER KONG. DEFENDANT TEMPLE HUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATED HE INTENDS TO PAY THE THE PLAINTIFF THE FULL CLAIM. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT CALLING, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
